items.title: COLUMN: The Blazers' handling of Micah Nori's contract has stuck with me. The decision is another example of the organization prioritizing penny-pinching over the baseline of respect the NBA has established for its workers.
items.author: Conor Bergin
items.body_excerpt:
COLUMN: The Blazers' handling of Micah Nori's contract has stuck with me. The decision is another example of the organization prioritizing penny-pinching over the baseline of respect the NBA has established for its workers.

That's unacceptable, and it shouldn't be controversial to say it.

media.title: I Don’t Care About T-Shirts, But Respect Matters
media.description: Just because you can doesn’t mean you should.

items.title: [Amick] The Celtics believed that Brown went off script too often during playoff games as Boston blew a 3-1 lead, according to a league source. Over the final 3 games, Celtics were outscored by 57 points w/ Brown on the court. In Game 7, he shot 12/27 and finished the series w/ more TOs than AST.
items.author: JoeBiden2020FTW
items.body_excerpt: Fascinating dump from Amick/King: Contributing to concerns about the situation, the Celtics believed that Brown went off script too often during playoff games as Boston blew a 3-1 first-round lead to Philadelphia, according to a league source. Over the final three games of that…
